desc: Delivered 4 production React websites driving 1.5x revenue growth measured by live analytics and client billing by architecting with React 19, TanStack Start, and TailwindCSS with full lifecycle ownership from design to Netlify deployment. Led development at a US-based digital agency, serving 50,000+ end users across restaurant, e-commerce, and agency platforms.

Built production RAG pipelines achieving high retrieval accuracy for academic resources measured by embedding quality benchmarks across vector databases by implementing retrieval architectures with Pinecone, ChromaDB, LangChain, and LlamaIndex. Engineered automated LLM evaluation pipelines and FastAPI backends for curriculum-aligned tutoring systems.

Shipped a 2D platformer game with 3 complete levels and 4 GitHub forks within a 3-month deadline by leading a team of 5 developers and building a custom OpenGL rendering engine with SFML audio and SQLite persistence.

Presented original climate research at an international conference with 100+ attendees demonstrating statistical findings on South Asian climate trends by conducting data collection, statistical modeling, and visualization of regional environmental data.

Won 1st Runner-Up in App Showcase competing against 20+ teams evaluated by industry judges on technical innovation and presentation quality by developing and demonstrating an innovative mobile application with polished UI/UX.
